# Twent — AI Agent for Android (2026)

> Your personal AI agentic OS in your pocket. Automate any app, run a real Ubuntu terminal, connect 1000+ services. Free download.

## What is Twent?

Twent is a free AI agent for Android that combines an AI chat overlay, full Ubuntu terminal, local AI models, and deep system automation — all on your device, zero cloud dependency.

## Core Features

- **AI Agent with Screen Awareness** — sees your screen, interacts with any app
- **Ubuntu 24.04 LTS Terminal** — bash, apt, Python, Node, Go, Rust on your phone
- **Local AI Models** — run GGUF models fully offline
- **MCP and Composio Integration** — 1000+ connected services
- **Persistent Memory** — remembers preferences and conversations
- **Floating Chat** — AI chat overlay on top of any app
- **Voice Activation** — say "Hey Twent" and start talking

## What Twent Is NOT

- **Not a chatbot.** ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini answer questions. Twent acts.
- **Not a cloud service.** Everything runs locally on your Android device.
- **Not a remote desktop app.** AI operates directly on your device.
- **Not a simple scheduler.** Full AI agent with persistent memory.
- **Not a ChatGPT wrapper.** Supports OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Deepseek, and local models.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://twent.xyz/) — Main landing
- [AI Agent for Developers](https://twent.xyz/ai-agent-for-developers) — Code on your phone
- [Ubuntu Terminal on Android](https://twent.xyz/terminal-on-android) — Linux in your pocket
- [Android Automation](https://twent.xyz/android-automation-power-user) — Auto-tap, swipe, scripts
- [Privacy-First AI](https://twent.xyz/privacy-first-ai-android) — Local models, zero telemetry
- [AI Marketplace](https://twent.xyz/ai-marketplace-creators) — Build and sell skills
- [Documentation](https://twent.xyz/docs) — Full guides
- [Pricing](https://twent.xyz/pricing) — All free

## Specifications

- Android 8.0+ (API 26), 3GB+ RAM, arm64-v8a, no root required

## Download

Get Twent at https://twent.xyz — direct APK, no Play Store, no credit card.
